skill.name: screenshots
skill.description: Generate marketing screenshots of your app using Playwright. Use when the user wants to create screenshots for Product Hunt, social media, landing pages, or documentation.
skill.summary: Create retina-quality marketing screenshots of web apps using Playwright with HiDPI support.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 83 pattern matches, but all are false positives. The SKILL.md file contains documentation and code examples for a legitimate Playwright screenshot tool. External commands are standard development tooling (npx, npm, node, mkdir). Network references are localhost examples in documentation. Filesystem operations create a screenshots directory for user output.

low_findings.title: External Command Execution
low_findings.description: Skill executes shell commands for Playwright operations and file management. Commands are standard development tooling with hardcoded arguments.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Commands are documented examples with hardcoded arguments - no user input injection risk exists.

low_findings.title: User Credential Collection
low_findings.description: Skill prompts users for login credentials (email, password) to access authenticated pages for screenshots. Credentials are used in generated scripts.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Clear documentation of credential collection for legitimate authentication flow - should be disclosed to users.

low_findings.title: Localhost Network Access
low_findings.description: Skill accesses localhost URLs provided by users for screenshot capture. This is expected behavior for a web app screenshot tool.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network access is limited to user-specified localhost URLs - core functionality, not a security risk.

content.value_statement: Creating marketing-quality screenshots for Product Hunt, social media, or documentation is time-consuming. This skill automates screenshot capture with retina resolution using Playwright.
actual_capabilities: Capture HiDPI (2x retina) screenshots at 2880x1800 resolution
Automate login flows for authenticated page screenshots
Generate multiple screenshots with consistent viewport settings
Support element-focused and full-page screenshot options
Handle dark mode and animation timing
Create organized output with descriptive filenames
limitations: Requires Playwright to be installed in the project
Requires a running dev server or accessible URL
Smart login locators may fail on non-standard login forms
Cannot capture screenshots of local files without a web server

use_cases.title: Product Hunt Launch
use_cases.description: Generate a set of 5-10 hero screenshots showcasing key features for your Product Hunt launch page.
use_cases.target_user: Startup founders preparing for product launches

use_cases.title: Documentation Screenshots
use_cases.description: Create consistent UI reference screenshots for user guides and tutorial documentation.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Produce eye-catching feature demo screenshots optimized for Twitter, LinkedIn, and other social platforms.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Screenshot Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Take screenshots of my app at http://localhost:3000 for a Product Hunt launch. I need 5 screenshots showing the dashboard, main features, and settings page.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick request for standard marketing screenshots

prompt_templates.title: Authenticated App Screenshots
prompt_templates.prompt: My app requires login. The login page is at /sign-in. Use email demo@example.com and password Demo123!. After login, screenshot the dashboard and user profile pages.

prompt_templates.title: Full-Page Feature Screenshots
prompt_templates.prompt: Capture full-page screenshots (not just viewport) of the pricing page and features page. Wait 500ms for animations to complete before capturing.

prompt_templates.title: Dark and Light Mode Variants
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate screenshots of the landing page in both light and dark mode. Use viewport 1440x900 with 2x retina scaling for marketing use.
prompt_templates.scenario: Multiple theme variants for marketing materials

output_examples.input: Generate 5 marketing screenshots of my Next.js app at localhost:3000
output_examples.output: Created screenshots directory and captured 5 retina-quality images: 01-landing-hero.png, 02-features-grid.png, 03-dashboard-view.png, 04-analytics-panel.png, 05-settings-modal.png. All files are 2880x1800 resolution ready for marketing use.

output_examples.input: Screenshot the pricing page after clicking the annual toggle
output_examples.output: Navigated to /pricing, clicked annual billing toggle, waited for price update animation, captured pricing-annual.png showing updated pricing display.

best_practices: Use seed or demo data to ensure screenshots show realistic content
Always wait for networkidle state to ensure full page loading
Use numeric prefixes in filenames for consistent ordering
anti_patterns: Do not commit screenshots with sensitive data to version control
Avoid capturing screenshots with personal user data or credentials visible
Do not use production URLs without explicit user confirmation

faq.question: Do I need to install Playwright separately?
faq.answer: Yes. Run npm install -D playwright or npm install -D @playwright/test before using this skill.

faq.question: What resolution are the screenshots?
faq.answer: Screenshots are captured at 2880x1800 pixels using 2x device scale factor for retina quality.

faq.question: Can this skill screenshot apps that require login?
faq.answer: Yes. Provide your login credentials when prompted, and the skill will authenticate before capturing screenshots.

faq.question: Where are the screenshots saved?
faq.answer: Screenshots are saved to a screenshots directory in your project root with descriptive kebab-case filenames.

faq.question: Can I capture screenshots in dark mode?
faq.answer: Yes. If your app supports dark mode, the skill can set the browser color scheme to dark before capturing.

faq.question: What if my dev server is not running?
faq.answer: The skill will detect if Playwright cannot connect and help you start your dev server before proceeding.
